acceptance_targets: [chapter_18_award_01] Pass if the revised opening still contains the internal 48-hour number, the Vulture review, and the split Reddit response, and at least one of those beats changes what Doug physically does next within snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:13-21. Fail if the section remains summary plus pull-quotes with no new on-page consequence.

[chapter_18_craft_01] Pass if the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:19-21, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:85, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:143 no longer name Doug's state with abstract summary labels like 'the moment,' 'fine,' or 'transformed,' while a cold reader can still infer that the public storm is easing and Doug is settling back into chosen adequacy. Fail if the narration still restates the point after the scene has already landed it.

[F09] No quoted Vulture review language appears in the chapter. No Reddit comment is quoted or paraphrased. The internet-response section (between the taping description and the return to Mutual Fidelity) occupies no more than 4 sentences. The Gloria call and Kelsey text remain fully present.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised opening still contains the internal 48-hour number, the Vulture review, and the split Reddit response, and at least one of those beats changes what Doug physically does next within snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:13-21. Fail if the section remains summary plus pull-quotes with no new on-page consequence.
findings.problem: The opening 'world verdict' beat is legible but too curated. The metric, the Vulture review, and the Reddit thread all arrive as representative artifacts Doug reads and closes, so the finale's public-aftershock feels digested rather than lived.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:13, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:15, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:17 so the required mixed-verdict material still appears, but at least one of those public-response beats creates immediate pressure on Doug inside the scene. Keep the 48-hour number, the review, and the split Reddit response, yet let one of them force a concrete action, avoidance, or bodily consequence instead of remaining a sampled reaction.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:19-21, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:85, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:143 no longer name Doug's state with abstract summary labels like 'the moment,' 'fine,' or 'transformed,' while a cold reader can still infer that the public storm is easing and Doug is settling back into chosen adequacy. Fail if the narration still restates the point after the scene has already landed it.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly explains Doug's settled state after the scenes have already rendered it. 'He was not the moment anymore,' 'This was fine,' 'It was not glamorous work. It was not content,' and 'he did not feel transformed' tell the reader the aftermath's meaning instead of letting the workday, the calls, and the home routine carry that meaning.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress or reframe the explanatory afterbeats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:19, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:21, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:85, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:143. Let the mixed verdict, the Linda Ostrowski claim, Gloria's call, and Doug's return to his queue communicate his slight shift through object detail, silence, or next action rather than thesis sentences.

findings.acceptance_test: No quoted Vulture review language appears in the chapter. No Reddit comment is quoted or paraphrased. The internet-response section (between the taping description and the return to Mutual Fidelity) occupies no more than 4 sentences. The Gloria call and Kelsey text remain fully present.
findings.problem: Chapter 18's strength is its quiet return to Doug's actual life — the desk, the claims call, Gloria's phone critique, the eggs, the open door. But the internet-response section (lines 4139-4147) provides external validation that the chapter's own images should make unnecessary. The Vulture review ('the most uncomfortable and oddly moving hour of comedy this year') gives the novel's reading of its own climax. The Reddit thread includes a comment — 'The part about the second bedroom made me call my dad' — that is sentimental confirmation the special 'worked,' arriving as emotional instruction rather than earned image. The 1.4 million household number is metric-level detail that converts the taping's meaning into a data point. These passages delay the chapter's true argument: that Doug's life didn't transform, and that's the resolution.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4139-4147, compress the internet-response section to no more than 3-4 sentences. The fact that the special exists and is public can be conveyed through a text from Layla and Doug's brief, characteristic phone check ('once in the morning, once at night'). Cut the Vulture review quote, the Reddit thread, and the specific Reddit comment about calling a dad. Keep the 1.4 million number only if Doug's indifference to it is the point (a single sentence: 'Layla sent a number. Doug read it, closed the phone.'). The Gloria call (lines 4231-4269) and Kelsey text (lines 4217-4229) are earned character responses and should remain — they ARE the external world's reaction, filtered through people Doug cares about rather than through anonymous internet metrics.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: This novel's greatest risk is timidity. The premise — a man who is not funny trying to be funny — invites a safe, gently comic execution where Doug is lovably bumbling and everything works out. Resist this. Doug's failures should be genuinely uncomfortable to witness. His loneliness should be genuinely lonely, not charmingly solitary. The toast should contain things that are genuinely inappropriate, not safely edgy. The comedy should come from truth that hurts, not from situations that are merely awkward. The moments of tenderness — the Gloria chapter, the Kelsey lunch, the Simone conversation — should be earned through accumulated specificity, not through the narrative signaling that it's time to feel. Every chapter should contain at least one moment that a cautious writer would soften, and the drafting agent should not soften it.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: Euphemism is a craft failure. If Doug is drunk, describe what drunk looks and feels like — the specific sensory experience, not the label. If Doug is lonely, show the loneliness through the objects and routines that fill the space where other people would be — the cereal dinner, the second bedroom, the unpacked boxes. If a scene involves embarrassment, shame, failure, or longing, render it in full physical and emotional detail. The reader should feel it, not be told about it. Replace every euphemism with the specific thing it is hiding.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High — contractions are the norm for most characters. Uncontracted forms should be reserved for emphasis, deliberate formality, or character-specific moments (Doug going precise under stress, Megan's composed register). If a line reads stiff and the character is not being deliberately formal, contract it.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: No two consecutive chapters should share the same structural rhythm. Vary: scene count (1-4), dialogue density (high-dialogue chapters followed by interior-heavy chapters), pacing (frenetic chapters followed by still ones), emotional register (comic escalation followed by tender quiet), narrative distance (very close interior followed by observed social scenes). The novel should feel like it breathes — tight chapters followed by loose ones, crowded chapters followed by solitary ones. Chapter 3 (quiet office day) must feel structurally different from Chapter 10 (quiet visit to Gloria). Chapter 9 (the corporate disaster) must feel structurally different from Chapter 14 (the tour), even though both involve performance failure. Achieve variety through scene construction, not through gimmick.
prose_style_profile.diction: Mid-register, clean, precise. No pyrotechnics. No extended metaphors. The prose should have the quality of someone describing what happened accurately — not artlessly, but without reaching for beauty. When beauty arrives, it should feel accidental, like Doug's humor: a precisely observed detail that turns out to be devastating not because the prose reached for devastation but because the detail was exact. Insurance language may surface in narration when it captures something emotional more precisely than emotional language would. Avoid lyrical flights, extended similes, or any construction that would sound wrong coming from a narrator who is sympathetic to Doug's plainness.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person, tightly bound to Doug's perspective. The narrator has access to Doug's interior — his observations, his assessments, his emotional processing through objects and details — but not to any other character's thoughts. Other characters are rendered through Doug's perception: what they say, how they move, what Doug notices about them. The narrator's voice is distinct from Doug's voice but sympathetic to it — slightly more articulate, slightly more aware, but never mocking and never superior. The humor in the narration comes from the same source as Doug's humor: precision about mundane things that reveals the absurdity or sadness underneath. The narrator does not explain the comedy. The narrator does not wink.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Varied and controlled. Default to mid-length sentences with clean syntax. Use short sentences for comic timing — the flat declarative that follows an elaborate setup. Use longer, more syntactically complex sentences for interior passages where Doug is processing something he cannot name. Avoid uniform sentence length across paragraphs. The prose should breathe — alternating between compression and expansion, between observation and reflection, between the external world and Doug's interior. Comedy requires rhythm more than any other mode: the setup needs room, the punch needs precision, and the space after needs silence.
